prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns for PANW (annualized volatility ~35-40%), a 3-day prediction uses geometric Brownian motion assumptions. The point estimate assumes slight positive drift. Confidence intervals account for ~2.3% daily volatility, with wider bands reflecting increased uncertainty over the 3-day horizon. PANW as a cybersecurity stock tends to have moderate to high volatility.
